mapper.select: SELECT d.*, p.thickness AS pThickness, p.width AS pWidth, p.density AS pDensity, p.gram_weight AS pGramWeight, p.material AS pMaterial, p.model AS pModel FROM pur_return_detail d LEFT JOIN base_product p ON d.product_id = p.id WHERE d.return_id = #{returnId} AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.line_no
